sqlMap.select: SELECT KEYID, FORMID AS FORMCODE, LOWER(USERID) AS USERID, LOWER(DEPTID) AS DEPTID, TITLE, BODYHTML AS BODY, STATUS, DOCID, TO_DATE(UPDATEDATE ,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AS UPDATEDATE FROM TBL_CONNDATA WHERE KEYID = #keyId# AND FORMID = #formCode#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CONNDATA SET STATUS = #status#, UPDATEDATE = SYSDATE , DOCID = #docId# WHERE KEYID = #keyId# AND FORMID = #formCode#
sqlMap.select: SELECT 'apr' AS UIFLAG FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #docId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# UNION ALL SELECT 'end' AS UIFLAG FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCID = #docId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId#
SELECT FORMXSLT FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE FORMID = #formId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CONNDATA (KEYID, USERID, DEPTID, TITLE, FORMID, BODYHTML, STATUS, UPDATEDATE) VALUES(#KEYID#, #USERID#, #DEPTID#, #TITLE#, #FORMID#, #BODYHTML#, 'INT', TO_DATE(#v_SYSDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))
